title: sorghum scoparium
intro: Sorghum scoparium, also known as broom sorghum, is a type of flowering plant in the sorghum genus, characterized by its slender stems and feathery foliage. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating wounds and skin irritations. The health benefits of sorghum scoparium are attributed to its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, which are often used to treat various health issues, including digestive problems and skin conditions.
